sentence: Meta debuts Friends tab, Mark Zuckerberg pushes 'throwback to OG Facebook'. Meta on Thursday debuted the Facebook Friends tab, a new feature that's part of CEO Mark Zuckerberg's pitch to revive the original spirit of his social networking app, or "OG Facebook" as he called it. "The new Friends tab is a throwback to OG Facebook when you only saw friends' status updates,"  Zuckerberg said in a post about the feature. "More OG Facebook coming soon " While "a lot of people use Facebook every day," Zuckerberg in January said he believed that there are "a lot of opportunities" to make the app "more culturally influential than it is today."
reasoning: 新聞不涉及 AI capex、GPU 供應或 US-China export restriction，但可能影響 AI compute demand

sentence: U.S. tech giants are betting big on humanoid robots — but China's already ahead, analysts say. Investor excitement surrounding the robots has been mounting amid increased mentions from tech leaders like Nvidia's Jensen Huang and ambitious plans from Tesla's Elon Musk. However, analysts warn that U.S. firms could lose out to China, which aims to replicate its success with electric vehicles in the nascent robotics space.
reasoning: 新聞涉及人工智慧機器人的發展，提到了 NVIDIA 的 CEO 杰森·黃的言論，但僅透露了美國公司可能會失去競爭優勢到中國。這意味著投資者可能會減少對 NVIDIA 的需求，而 NVIDIA 股價主要受到預期意願的影響。

sentence: Nvidia-backed CoreWeave closes flat at $40 after biggest U.S. tech IPO since 2021. CoreWeave's shares started trading on the Nasdaq on Friday under the ticker symbol "CRWV." The company raised $1.5 billion in its initial public offering, the most for a U.S. tech offering since UiPath's debut in 2021. Microsoft, Amazon, Google and Oracle are all competitors.
reasoning: 新聞涉及NVIDIA在CoreWeave IPO背書的案例，與其他AI大廠競爭，而非直接影響GPU供應，因此不能視為與NVIDIA供應鏈相關。

sentence: Intel announces three board members will retire following CEO shake-up. Three members of Intel's board of directors will not stand for reelection in May, the company said in a Thursday filing. The shake-up comes after Intel named Lip-Bu Tan as its new CEO earlier this month. Tan is slated to speak publicly next week at the company's Intel Vision event in Las Vegas. The talk is titled "A New Intel."
reasoning: 公司治理變動與AI領域無直接關係, 不影響NVIDIA的營運。

sentence: Alibaba has staged a quiet $100 billion rally — AI and Jack Ma's return are at the heart of it. Alibaba's U.S. listed-shares have quietly risen nearly 60% this year, adding more than $100 billion to the company's valuation. It's a turnaround from the last few years, which have seen the e-commerce giant's core business under pressure and close scrutiny from the Chinese government. Recent success has been credited to Alibaba's artificial intelligence push, helped by the attention DeepSeek has brought on China, as well as the return of co-founder Jack Ma to the public eye.
reasoning: Alibaba 的 AI 推動與 NVIDIA 股價有直接關聯，因為這表明對於人工智能應用需求的增加

sentence: Here are Monday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Tesla, Broadcom, Apple, Cava, Meta, Alphabet and more
